basic_details.job_title: District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of District Commissioner Bongaigaon. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Not less than 2 years of continuous service as District Administrative Supervisory Assistant
qualification.details: Not less than 2 years of continuous service as District Administrative Supervisory Assistant in the concerned District Commissioner's Establishment.

salary_details.details: Rs. 22,000/- to Rs. 97,000/- with Grade Pay of Rs. 10,300/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Administrative Head Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Administrative Head Assistant post is 01 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the District Administrative Head Assistant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the District Administrative Head Assistant post in the District Commissioner Bongaigaon Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The primary qualification is not less than 2 years of continuous service as a District Administrative Supervisory Assistant in the concerned District Commissioner's Establishment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the District Administrative Head Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 22,000/- to Rs. 97,000/- per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 10,300/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the District Administrative Head Assistant post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the District Administrative Head Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for the District Commissioner Bongaigaon District Administrative Head Assistant Recruitment 2026 is BPE.15/2026/16.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Commissioner Bongaigaon, located in Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
